attr.title: Grim Dungeon
attr.desc:
Grim Dungeon is a vertical slice of a JRPG project, made with Godot.
Crawl through the dungeon and defeat the final boss by using your abilities intelligently.
attr.inst: Download the port as well as Grim Dungeon LINUX.zip from https://efilheim.itch.io/grimdungeon and extract the grimdungeon.pck to the grimdungeon folder on your device
